summary: Status: BINDING for every Opus-executed experiment. Authorised by Jesse (2026-07-09) while Fable is out of quota. Opus may EXECUTE routine experiment work — right-size / freeze / GPU-launch / mechanical-verdict / Codex-audit — under the five practices below. Design law is unchanged: `tools/registry` is law; the honesty discipline binds; run-vs-audit separation stands (the Codex / GPT-5.5 auditor is a different vendor, invoked via the `codex` CLI).
title: Opus-execution practices (governing doc)
